validation_outcome: Repo-root make clean (exit 0). GUI suite OK (75 tests) = 71 baseline + 4 new, no hang/crash/failure. SSWTests OK (217 tests), no regressions.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Cancelling Save leaves the filesystem untouched and does not call FGame::save.
Confirming Save writes to the dialog's full GetPath() location.
Cancelling Open creates no FGame and attempts no load; the frame stays consistent.
Confirming Open loads from GetPath() and restores the post-load menu/turn state.
Repo builds clean; the GUI suite passes.

red_verification.method: Temporary local revert of src/FMainFrame.cpp to pre-fix 37fb564b, rebuilt, re-ran GUI suite, then restored via git checkout HEAD (never committed).

results.testMainFrameOnOpenCancelCreatesNoGameAn: RED (segfault in onOpen()->FGame::load() on the Cancel path); green after fix.
results.testMainFrameOnSaveCancelLeavesFilesyste: Green against pre-fix and post-fix: a cancelled native dialog returns an empty GetFilename(), so the pre-fix ofstream("") also creates no file. Post-fix contract lock.
results.testMainFrameOnSaveConfirmWritesToDialog: Green against pre-fix and post-fix: wxFD_CHANGE_DIR chdirs into the chosen folder on accept, so pre-fix GetFilename() resolves to the same absolute path as GetPath(). Post-fix contract lock.
results.testMainFrameOnOpenConfirmLoadsFromFullP: Green against pre-fix and post-fix: same wxFD_CHANGE_DIR equivalence as the Save confirm case. Post-fix contract lock.
